name: Michelle Jones "MJ"
description: MJ short for Michelle Jones, becomes friends with Peter Parker and Ned Leeds. After the Blip, she and Parker start a relationship and confront Mysterio. When Parker is framed, MJ, Parker, and Ned face rejection from colleges. Seeking a spell to erase Spider-Man's identity, chaos ensues, bringing foes from other universes. In a battle at the Statue of Liberty, MJ is saved by an alternate Parker. The spell is fixed, and Parker and MJ declare their love before parting ways to protect each other, with Parker deciding not to reintroduce himself to MJ and Ned to protect them. MJ starts her new life At MIT.
creator: deadcool
